name: Sarah Lacina
signature_move: Stole Sierra Dawn Thomas's legacy advantage by building a fake friendship, then used the vote steal at Final 6 to take control of the game — playing what she described as 'like a criminal' after being voted out for playing too honestly in Cagayan.
strategy_summary: Sarah completely reinvented her game from Cagayan, where she was blindsided for being too trusting. In Game Changers, she played a calculated, cutthroat game — stealing advantages, building and betraying alliances at will, and always positioning herself as the swing vote. Her ability to cry genuine tears while backstabbing allies made her one of the most effective social manipulators in Survivor history.
fun_fact: Sarah is a police officer from Iowa who used her interrogation training to read other players, saying she 'played like a criminal' the second time around after playing 'like a cop' in Cagayan.
